21	
22	class DFlushFenceiIO(p: Parameters) extends DFlushIO(p) {
23	  val fencei = Output(Bool())
24	  val pcNext = Output(UInt(p.programCounterBits.W))
25	}
26	
27	class Lsu(p: Parameters) extends Module {
28	  val io = IO(new Bundle {
29	    // Decode cycle.
30	    val req = Vec(p.instructionLanes, Flipped(Decoupled(new LsuCmd(p))))
31	    val busPort = Flipped(new RegfileBusPortIO(p))
32	    val busPort_flt = Option.when(p.enableFloat)(Flipped(new RegfileBusPortIO(p)))
33	
34	    // Execute cycle(s).
35	    val rd = Valid(Flipped(new RegfileWriteDataIO(p)))
36	    val rd_flt = Valid(Flipped(new FloatRegfileWriteDataIO(p)))
37	
38	    // Cached interface.
39	    val ibus = new IBusIO(p)
40	    val dbus = new DBusIO(p)
41	    val flush = new DFlushFenceiIO(p)
42	    val fault = Valid(new FaultInfo(p))
43	
44	    // DBus that will eventually reach an external bus.
45	    // Intended for sending a transaction to an external
46	    // peripheral, likely on TileLink or AXI.
47	    val ebus = new EBusIO(p)
48	
49	    // Vector switch.
50	    val vldst = Output(Bool())
51	
52	    val rvv2lsu = Option.when(p.enableRvv)(
53	        Vec(2, Flipped(Decoupled(new Rvv2Lsu(p)))))
54	    val lsu2rvv = Option.when(p.enableRvv)(Vec(2, Decoupled(new Lsu2Rvv(p))))
55	
56	    // RVV config state
57	    val rvvState = Option.when(p.enableRvv)(Input(Valid(new RvvConfigState(p))))
58	
59	    val queueCapacity = Output(UInt(3.W))
60	    val active = Output(Bool())
61	    val storeComplete = Output(Valid(UInt(p.programCounterBits.W)))
62	  })
63	}
64	
65	object Lsu {
66	  def apply(p: Parameters): Lsu = {
67	    return Module(new LsuV2(p))
68	  }
69	}
70	
71	object LsuOp extends ChiselEnum {
72	  val LB  = Value
73	  val LH  = Value
74	  val LW  = Value
75	  val LBU = Value
76	  val LHU = Value
77	  val SB  = Value
78	  val SH  = Value
79	  val SW  = Value
80	  val FENCEI = Value
81	  val FLUSHAT = Value
82	  val FLUSHALL = Value
83	  val VLDST = Value
84	  val FLOAT = Value
85	
86	  // Vector instructions.
87	  val VLOAD_UNIT = Value
88	  val VLOAD_STRIDED = Value
89	  val VLOAD_OINDEXED = Value
90	  val VLOAD_UINDEXED = Value
91	  val VSTORE_UNIT = Value
92	  val VSTORE_STRIDED = Value
93	  val VSTORE_OINDEXED = Value
94	  val VSTORE_UINDEXED = Value
95	
96	  def isVector(op: LsuOp.Type): Bool = {
97	    op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_UNIT, LsuOp.VLOAD_STRIDED,
98	               LsuOp.VLOAD_OINDEXED, LsuOp.VLOAD_UINDEXED,
99	               LsuOp.VSTORE_UNIT, LsuOp.VSTORE_STRIDED,
100	               LsuOp.VSTORE_OINDEXED, LsuOp.VSTORE_UINDEXED)
101	  }
102	
103	  def isIndexedVector(op: LsuOp.Type): Bool = {
104	    op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_OINDEXED, LsuOp.VLOAD_UINDEXED,
105	               LsuOp.VSTORE_OINDEXED, LsuOp.VSTORE_UINDEXED)
106	  }
107	
108	  def isNonindexedVector(op: LsuOp.Type): Bool = {
109	    op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_UNIT, LsuOp.VLOAD_STRIDED,
110	               LsuOp.VSTORE_UNIT, LsuOp.VSTORE_STRIDED)
111	  }
112	
113	  def isFlush(op: LsuOp.Type): Bool = {
114	    op.isOneOf(LsuOp.FENCEI, LsuOp.FLUSHAT, LsuOp.FLUSHALL)
115	  }
116	
117	  def isScalarLoad(op: LsuOp.Type): Bool = {
118	    op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LB, LsuOp.LBU, LsuOp.LH, LsuOp.LHU, LsuOp.LW)
119	  }
120	
121	  def opSize(op: LsuOp.Type, address: UInt, p: Parameters): (UInt, UInt) = {
122	    val halfAligned = (address(0) === 0.U)
123	    val wordAligned = (address(1, 0) === 0.U)
124	
125	    val size = MuxUpTo1H(16.U, Seq(
126	      op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LB, LsuOp.LBU, LsuOp.SB) -> 1.U,
127	      op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LH, LsuOp.LHU, LsuOp.SH) -> Mux(halfAligned, 2.U, 16.U),
128	      op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LW, LsuOp.SW, LsuOp.FLOAT) ->
129	          Mux(wordAligned, 4.U, 16.U),
130	      LsuOp.isVector(op) -> 16.U,
131	    ))
132	
133	    val halfAlignedAddress = address(p.lsuAddrBits - 1, 1) << 1.U
134	    val wordAlignedAddress = address(p.lsuAddrBits - 1, 2) << 2.U
135	    val lineAlignedAddress = address(p.lsuAddrBits - 1, 4) << 4.U
136	    val alignedAddress = MuxUpTo1H(lineAlignedAddress, Seq(
137	      op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LB, LsuOp.LBU, LsuOp.SB) -> address,
138	      (op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LH, LsuOp.LHU, LsuOp.SH) && halfAligned) ->
139	          halfAlignedAddress,
140	      (op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LW, LsuOp.SW, LsuOp.FLOAT) && wordAligned) ->
141	          wordAlignedAddress,
142	    ))
143	
144	    (size, alignedAddress)
145	  }
146	}
147	
148	class LsuCmd(p: Parameters) extends Bundle {
149	  val store = Bool()
150	  val addr = UInt(log2Ceil(p.scalarRegCount).W)
151	  val op = LsuOp()
152	  val pc = UInt(p.programCounterBits.W)
153	  val elemWidth = Option.when(p.enableRvv) { UInt(3.W) }
154	  val nfields = Option.when(p.enableRvv) { UInt(3.W) }
155	  val umop = Option.when(p.enableRvv) { UInt(5.W) }
156	
157	  def isMaskOperation(): Bool = {
158	    if (p.enableRvv) {
159	      (umop.get === "b01011".U) &&
160	      op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_UNIT, LsuOp.VSTORE_UNIT)
161	    } else {
162	      false.B
163	    }
164	  }
165	
166	  def isWholeRegister(): Bool = {
167	    if (p.enableRvv) {
168	      (umop.get === "b01000".U) &&
169	      op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_UNIT, LsuOp.VSTORE_UNIT)
170	    } else {
171	      false.B
172	    }
173	  }
174	
175	  override def toPrintable: Printable = {
176	    cf"LsuCmd(store -> ${store}, addr -> 0x${addr}%x, op -> ${op}, " +
177	    cf"pc -> 0x${pc}%x, elemWidth -> ${elemWidth}, nfields -> ${nfields})"
178	  }
179	}
180	
181	class LsuUOp(p: Parameters) extends Bundle {
182	  val store = Bool()
183	  val rd = UInt(log2Ceil(p.scalarRegCount).W)
184	  val op = LsuOp()
185	  val pc = UInt(p.programCounterBits.W)
186	  val addr = UInt(p.lsuAddrBits.W)
187	  val data = UInt(p.xlen.W)  // Doubles as rs2
188	  // This aligns with "width" in the spec. It controls index width in
189	  // indexed loads/stores and data width otherwise.
190	  val elemWidth = Option.when(p.enableRvv) { UInt(3.W) }
191	  // This is the sew from vtype. It controls data width in indexed
192	  // loads/stores and is unused in other ops.
193	  val sew = Option.when(p.enableRvv) { UInt(3.W) }
194	  // How many data registers (per segment if applicable) to operate on.
195	  val emul_data = Option.when(p.enableRvv) { UInt(3.W) }
196	  val emul_data_orig = Option.when(p.enableRvv) { UInt(3.W) }
197	  val nfields = Option.when(p.enableRvv) { UInt(3.W) }
198	
199	  override def toPrintable: Printable = {
200	    cf"LsuUOp(store -> ${store}, rd -> ${rd}, op -> ${op}, " +
201	    cf"pc -> 0x${pc}%x, addr -> 0x${addr}%x, data -> ${data})"
202	  }
203	}
204	
205	object LsuUOp {
206	  def apply(p: Parameters,
207	            i: Int,
208	            cmd: LsuCmd,
209	            sbus: RegfileBusPortIO,
210	            fbus: Option[RegfileBusPortIO],
211	            rvvState: Option[Valid[RvvConfigState]]): LsuUOp = {
212	    val result = Wire(new LsuUOp(p))
213	    result.store := cmd.store
214	    result.rd := cmd.addr
215	    result.op := cmd.op
216	    result.pc := cmd.pc
217	    if (fbus.isDefined) {
218	      result.addr := sbus.addr(i)
219	      result.data := Mux(
220	          cmd.op === LsuOp.FLOAT, fbus.get.data(i), sbus.data(i))
221	    } else {
222	      result.addr := sbus.addr(i)
223	      result.data := sbus.data(i)
224	    }
225	    if (p.enableRvv) {
226	      val eew = cmd.elemWidth.get  // From instruction encoding
227	      val sew = rvvState.get.bits.sew  // From vtype
228	      val lmul_eff = rvvState.get.bits.lmul
229	      val lmul_orig = rvvState.get.bits.lmul_orig
230	      // TODO(davidgao): Add checks for illegal LMUL values in the frontend.
231	      def lmulToDataEmul(lmul: UInt): UInt = {
232	        // Unit-stride, const-stride. Default value applies when eew == sew.
233	        val emul_data = MuxUpTo1H(lmul, Seq(
234	            // eew == 1/4 sew
235	            (eew === "b000".U && sew === "b010".U) -> (lmul - 2.U),
236	            // eew == 1/2 sew
237	            ((eew === "b000".U && sew === "b001".U) ||
238	             (eew === "b101".U && sew === "b010".U)) -> (lmul - 1.U),
239	            // eew == 2 sew
240	            ((eew === "b101".U && sew === "b000".U) ||
241	             (eew === "b110".U && sew === "b001".U)) -> (lmul + 1.U),
242	            // eew == 4 sew
243	            (eew === "b110".U && sew === "b000".U) -> (lmul + 2.U),
244	        ))
245	        MuxCase(lmul, Seq(
246	            // If mask operation, always make LMUL=1.
247	            cmd.isMaskOperation() -> 0.U,
248	            // Section 7.9 of RVV Spec: "The nf field encodes how many vector
249	            // registers to load and store".
250	            cmd.isWholeRegister() -> MuxUpTo1H(0.U, Seq(
251	                (cmd.nfields.get === 0.U) -> 0.U,  // NF1 -> LMUL1
252	                (cmd.nfields.get === 1.U) -> 1.U,  // NF2 -> LMUL2
253	                (cmd.nfields.get === 3.U) -> 2.U,  // NF4 -> LMUL4
254	                (cmd.nfields.get === 7.U) -> 3.U,  // NF8 -> LMUL8
255	            )),
256	            LsuOp.isNonindexedVector(cmd.op) -> emul_data,
257	            // default: indexed vector and scalar
258	        ))
259	      }
260	
261	      result.elemWidth.get := eew
262	      result.emul_data.get := lmulToDataEmul(lmul_eff)
263	      result.emul_data_orig.get := lmulToDataEmul(lmul_orig)
264	
265	      // If mask operation, force fields to zero
266	      result.nfields.get := MuxUpTo1H(cmd.nfields.get, Seq(
267	          cmd.isMaskOperation() -> 0.U,
268	          cmd.isWholeRegister() -> 0.U,
269	      ))
270	      result.sew.get := rvvState.get.bits.sew
271	    }
272	
273	    result
274	  }
275	}
276	
277	object ComputeStridedAddrs {
278	  def apply(bytesPerSlot: Int,
279	            baseAddr: UInt,
280	            stride: UInt,
281	            elemWidth: UInt): Vec[UInt] = {
282	    val addrWidth = baseAddr.getWidth
283	    MuxUpTo1H(VecInit.fill(bytesPerSlot)(0.U(addrWidth.W)), Seq(
284	      // elemWidth validation is done at decode time.
285	      // TODO: pass this as an enum.
286	      (elemWidth === "b000".U) -> VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(
287	          i => (baseAddr + (i.U*stride))(addrWidth - 1, 0))),  // 1-byte elements
288	      (elemWidth === "b101".U) -> VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(
289	          i => (baseAddr + ((i >> 1).U*stride))(addrWidth - 1, 0) + (i & 1).U)),  // 2-byte elements
290	      (elemWidth === "b110".U) -> VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(
291	          i => (baseAddr + ((i >> 2).U*stride))(addrWidth - 1, 0) + (i & 3).U)),  // 4-byte elements
292	    ))
293	  }
294	}
295	
296	object ComputeIndexedAddrs {
297	  def apply(bytesPerSlot: Int,
298	            baseAddr: UInt,
299	            indices: UInt,
300	            indexWidth: UInt,
301	            sew: UInt): Vec[UInt] = {
302	    val addrWidth = baseAddr.getWidth
303	    val indices8 = UIntToVec(indices, 8).map(x => Cat(0.U((addrWidth - 8).W), x))
304	    val indices16 = UIntToVec(indices, 16).map(x => Cat(0.U((addrWidth - 16).W), x))
305	    val indices32 = UIntToVec(indices, 32).map(x => if (addrWidth > 32) Cat(0.U((addrWidth - 32).W), x) else x)
306	
307	    val indices_v = MuxUpTo1H(VecInit.fill(bytesPerSlot)(0.U(addrWidth.W)), Seq(
308	      // 8-bit indices.
309	      (indexWidth === "b000".U) -> VecInit(indices8),
310	      // 16-bit indices.
311	      (indexWidth === "b101".U) -> VecInit(indices16 ++ indices16),
312	      // 32-bit indices.
313	      (indexWidth === "b110".U) -> VecInit(
314	          indices32 ++ indices32 ++ indices32 ++ indices32),
315	    ))
316	
317	    MuxUpTo1H(VecInit.fill(bytesPerSlot)(0.U(addrWidth.W)), Seq(
318	      // elemWidth validation is done at decode time.
319	      // 8-bit data. Each byte has its own offset.
320	      (sew === "b000".U) -> VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(
321	          i => (baseAddr + indices_v(i)))),
322	      // 16-bit data. Each 2-byte element has an offset.
323	      (sew === "b001".U) -> VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(
324	          i => (baseAddr + indices_v(i >> 1) + (i & 1).U))),
325	      // 32-bit data. Each 4-byte element has an offset.
326	      (sew === "b010".U) -> VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(
327	          i => (baseAddr + indices_v(i >> 2) + (i & 3).U)))
328	    ))
329	  }
330	}
331	
332	class LsuVectorLoop extends Bundle {
333	  val subvector = new LoopingCounter(3.W)
334	  val segment = new LoopingCounter(4.W)
335	  val lmul = new LoopingCounter(4.W)
336	  val lmul_orig = UInt(4.W)
337	  // Additional internal states to help drive derived outputs.
338	  val rdStart = UInt(5.W)
339	  val rd = UInt(5.W)
340	
341	  def isActive(): Bool = {
342	    (!subvector.isFull()) || (!segment.isFull()) || (!lmul.isFull())
343	  }
344	
345	  def nextSubvector(): LsuVectorLoop = {
346	    val result = MakeWireBundle[LsuVectorLoop](new LsuVectorLoop, _ -> this)
347	    result.subvector := subvector.next()
348	    result
349	  }
350	
351	  def nextVector(): LsuVectorLoop = {
352	    val result = MakeWireBundle[LsuVectorLoop](new LsuVectorLoop, _ -> this)
353	    result.subvector := subvector.reset()
354	    result.segment := Mux(segment.isFull(), segment.reset(), segment.next())
355	    result.lmul := Mux(segment.isFull(), lmul.next(), lmul)
356	    result.rd := Mux(segment.isFull(),
357	                     rdStart + lmul.next().curr,
358	                     rd + lmul_orig)
359	    result
360	  }
361	
362	  override def toPrintable: Printable = {
363	    cf"    subvector: ${subvector.curr} of [0..${subvector.max}]\n" +
364	    cf"    segment: ${segment.curr} of [0..${segment.max}]\n" +
365	    cf"    lmul: ${lmul.curr} of [0..${lmul.max}], orig=${lmul_orig}\n" +
366	    cf"    rdStart: ${rdStart}\n    rd: ${rd}\n"
367	  }
368	}
369	
370	// bytesPerSlot is the number of bytes in a vector register
371	// p.lsuDataBytes is the number of bytes in the AXI bus
372	class LsuSlot(p: Parameters, bytesPerSlot: Int) extends Bundle {
373	  val elemBits = log2Ceil(p.lsuDataBytes)
374	
375	  val op = LsuOp()
376	  val rd = UInt(log2Ceil(p.scalarRegCount).W)
377	  val store = Bool()
378	  val pc = UInt(p.programCounterBits.W)
379	  val baseAddr = UInt(p.lsuAddrBits.W)
380	  val active = Vec(bytesPerSlot, Bool())
381	  val addrs = Vec(bytesPerSlot, UInt(p.lsuAddrBits.W))
382	  val data = Vec(bytesPerSlot, UInt(8.W))
383	  val pendingWriteback = Bool()
384	  val elemStride = UInt(p.xlen.W)     // Stride between lanes in a vector
385	  val segmentStride = UInt(p.xlen.W)  // Stride between base addr between segments
386	  // This aligns with "width" in the spec. It controls index width in
387	  // indexed loads/stores and data width otherwise.
388	  val elemWidth = UInt(3.W)
389	  // This controls data width in indexed loads/stores and is unused in
390	  // other ops.
391	  val sew = UInt(3.W)
392	  // Number of time indices repeats (up to 4 times)
393	  val indexParitions = UInt(3.W)
394	  val vectorLoop = new LsuVectorLoop()
395	
396	  def pendingVector(): Bool = {
397	    !vectorLoop.subvector.isFull()
398	  }
399	
400	  // If the slot has no pending tasks and can accept a new operation
401	  def slotIdle(): Bool = !(
402	      active.reduce(_||_) ||  // Active transaction
403	      pendingWriteback ||     // Send result back to regfile
404	      vectorLoop.isActive()     // More vector operations in progress
405	  )
406	
407	  // If the slot has any active transactions.
408	  def activeTransaction(): Bool = {
409	    (!pendingVector()) && active.reduce(_||_)
410	  }
411	
412	  def lineAddresses(): Vec[UInt] = {
413	    VecInit(addrs.map(x => x(p.lsuAddrBits - 1, elemBits)))
414	  }
415	
416	  def elemAddresses(): Vec[UInt] = {
417	    VecInit(addrs.map(x => x(elemBits-1, 0)))
418	  }
419	
420	  def targetAddress(lastRead: Valid[UInt]): Valid[UInt] = {
421	    // Determine which lines are active. If a read was issued last cycle,
422	    // supress those lines.
423	    val lineAddrs = lineAddresses()
424	    val lineActive = (0 until bytesPerSlot).map(i =>
425	        !pendingVector() &&
426	        active(i) && (!lastRead.valid || (lastRead.bits =/= lineAddrs(i))))
427	
428	    MuxCase(MakeInvalid(UInt(p.lsuAddrBits.W)), (0 until bytesPerSlot).map(
429	        i => lineActive(i) -> MakeValid(!pendingVector(), addrs(i))))
430	  }
431	
432	  def vectorUpdate(rvv2lsu: Rvv2Lsu): LsuSlot = {
433	    val result = Wire(new LsuSlot(p, bytesPerSlot))
434	    result.op := op
435	    result.rd := rd
436	    result.store := store
437	    result.pc := pc
438	    result.pendingWriteback := pendingWriteback
439	    result.baseAddr := baseAddr
440	    result.elemStride := elemStride
441	    result.segmentStride := segmentStride
442	    result.indexParitions := indexParitions
443	    result.vectorLoop := vectorLoop.nextSubvector()
444	    result.elemWidth := elemWidth
445	    result.sew := sew
446	
447	    val segmentBaseAddr = baseAddr + (segmentStride * vectorLoop.segment.curr)(p.lsuAddrBits - 1, 0)
448	    val bitsPerSlot = bytesPerSlot * 8
449	    val indices = MuxUpTo1H(rvv2lsu.idx.bits.data, Seq(
450	        // 2 of 2
451	        ((indexParitions === 2.U) && (vectorLoop.lmul.curr(0) === 1.U)) -> (rvv2lsu.idx.bits.data(bitsPerSlot - 1, bitsPerSlot / 2)),
452	        // 2 of 4
453	        ((indexParitions === 4.U) && (vectorLoop.lmul.curr(1, 0) === 1.U)) -> (rvv2lsu.idx.bits.data(bitsPerSlot / 2 - 1, bitsPerSlot / 4)),
454	        // 3 of 4
455	        ((indexParitions === 4.U) && (vectorLoop.lmul.curr(1, 0) === 2.U)) -> (rvv2lsu.idx.bits.data(bitsPerSlot * 3 / 4 - 1, bitsPerSlot / 2)),
456	        // 4 of 4
457	        ((indexParitions === 4.U) && (vectorLoop.lmul.curr(1, 0) === 3.U)) -> (rvv2lsu.idx.bits.data(bitsPerSlot - 1, bitsPerSlot * 3 / 4)),
458	    ))
459	
460	    val shouldUpdate = LsuOp.isNonindexedVector(op) ||
461	                       (!vectorLoop.subvector.isEnabled()) ||
462	                       rvv2lsu.idx.valid
463	    val newActiveBytes = Mux(
464	        shouldUpdate && LsuOp.isVector(op) && rvv2lsu.mask.valid,
465	        VecInit(rvv2lsu.mask.bits.asBools),
466	        VecInit.fill(bytesPerSlot)(false.B))
467	
468	    val updateAddrs = MuxUpTo1H(addrs, Seq(
469	        op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_UNIT, LsuOp.VSTORE_UNIT) ->
470	            ComputeStridedAddrs(bytesPerSlot, segmentBaseAddr, elemStride, elemWidth),
471	        op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_STRIDED, LsuOp.VSTORE_STRIDED) ->
472	            ComputeStridedAddrs(bytesPerSlot, segmentBaseAddr, elemStride, elemWidth),
473	        op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_OINDEXED, LsuOp.VLOAD_UINDEXED,
474	                   LsuOp.VSTORE_OINDEXED, LsuOp.VSTORE_UINDEXED) ->
475	            ComputeIndexedAddrs(bytesPerSlot, segmentBaseAddr, indices,
476	                                elemWidth, sew),
477	    ))
478	
479	    result.active := VecInit.tabulate(bytesPerSlot)(
480	        i => active(i) || newActiveBytes(i))
481	
482	    result.addrs := VecInit.tabulate(bytesPerSlot)(
483	        i => Mux(newActiveBytes(i), updateAddrs(i), addrs(i)))
484	
485	    result.data := Mux(shouldUpdate && LsuOp.isVector(op) && rvv2lsu.vregfile.valid,
486	        UIntToVec(rvv2lsu.vregfile.bits.data, 8), data)
487	
488	    result
489	  }
490	
491	  // Updates the slot based on a previous read.
492	  def loadUpdate(lineAddr: UInt, lineData: UInt): LsuSlot = {
493	    // TODO(derekjchow): Check ordering semantics
494	    val lineAddrs = lineAddresses()
495	    val lineActive = VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(i =>
496	        active(i) &&  // Update only if active
497	        (lineAddrs(i) === lineAddr)))  // Line must match read line
498	    val lineDataVec = UIntToVec(lineData, 8)
499	    val gatheredData = Gather(elemAddresses(), lineDataVec)
500	
501	    val result = Wire(new LsuSlot(p, bytesPerSlot))
502	    result.op := op
503	    result.rd := rd
504	    result.store := store
505	    result.pc := pc
506	    result.baseAddr := baseAddr
507	    result.addrs := addrs
508	    result.pendingWriteback := pendingWriteback
509	    result.active := (0 until bytesPerSlot).map(
510	        i => active(i) & ~lineActive(i))
511	    result.data := VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(
512	        i => Mux(lineActive(i), gatheredData(i), data(i))))
513	    result.elemStride := elemStride
514	    result.segmentStride := segmentStride
515	    result.elemWidth := elemWidth
516	    result.sew := sew
517	    result.indexParitions := indexParitions
518	    result.vectorLoop := vectorLoop
519	
520	    result
521	  }
522	
523	  // If the load transaction is finished, but the result needs to be written
524	  // back to the regfile.
525	  def shouldWriteback(): Bool = {
526	    !pendingVector() && !active.reduce(_||_) && pendingWriteback
527	  }
528	
529	  // Updates the slot if its result is written back to the regfile.
530	  def writebackUpdate(): LsuSlot = {
531	    val result = Wire(new LsuSlot(p, bytesPerSlot))
532	    result.op := op
533	    result.store := store
534	    result.pc := pc
535	    result.addrs := addrs
536	    result.active := active
537	    result.data := data
538	    result.elemStride := elemStride
539	    result.segmentStride := segmentStride
540	    result.elemWidth := elemWidth
541	    result.sew := sew
542	
543	    val vectorLoopNext = vectorLoop.nextVector()
544	    val vectorWriteback = vectorLoop.isActive()
545	    val finished = vectorLoopNext.lmul.isFull()
546	    val finishedVectorLoop = Wire(new LsuVectorLoop)
547	    finishedVectorLoop := vectorLoop
548	    finishedVectorLoop.subvector.curr := vectorLoop.subvector.max
549	    finishedVectorLoop.segment.curr := vectorLoop.segment.max
550	    finishedVectorLoop.lmul.curr := vectorLoop.lmul.max
551	
552	    result.indexParitions := indexParitions
553	    result.vectorLoop := Mux(finished,
554	                             finishedVectorLoop,
555	                             vectorLoopNext)
556	    result.pendingWriteback := !finished
557	
558	    // TODO(davidgao): absorb baseAddr offset computation into vectorLoop
559	    val lmulUpdate = vectorWriteback && vectorLoop.segment.isFull()
560	    result.baseAddr := MuxCase(baseAddr, Seq(
561	      !lmulUpdate -> baseAddr,
562	      // For Unit and strided updates
563	      op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_UNIT, LsuOp.VSTORE_UNIT) ->
564	          (baseAddr + (vectorLoop.segment.max * 16.U) + 16.U),
565	      op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_STRIDED, LsuOp.VSTORE_STRIDED) ->
566	          MuxUpTo1H(baseAddr + (elemStride * bytesPerSlot.U), Seq(
567	            (elemWidth === "b000".U) ->
568	                (baseAddr + (elemStride * bytesPerSlot.U)),
569	            (elemWidth === "b101".U) ->
570	                (baseAddr + (elemStride * (bytesPerSlot/2).U)),
571	            (elemWidth === "b110".U) ->
572	                (baseAddr + (elemStride * (bytesPerSlot/4).U)),
573	          ))
574	          // (baseAddr + (vectorLoop.segment.max * elemStride)(31, 0)),
575	
576	      // Indexed don't have base addr changed.
577	    ))
578	    result.rd := result.vectorLoop.rd
579	
580	    result
581	  }
582	
583	  def scatter(lineAddr: UInt): (Vec[UInt], Vec[Bool], Vec[Bool]) = {
584	    val canScatter = store && (!LsuOp.isVector(op) || !pendingVector())
585	    val lineAddrs = lineAddresses()
586	    val lineActive = VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(i =>
587	        canScatter && active(i) & (lineAddrs(i) === lineAddr)))
588	    Scatter(lineActive, elemAddresses(), data)
589	  }
590	
591	  def storeUpdate(selected: Vec[Bool]): LsuSlot = {
592	    assert(selected.length == active.length)
593	    val result = Wire(new LsuSlot(p, bytesPerSlot))
594	    result.op := op
595	    result.rd := rd
596	    result.store := store
597	    result.pc := pc
598	    result.pendingWriteback := pendingWriteback
599	    result.active := (0 until bytesPerSlot).map(i => active(i) & ~selected(i))
600	    result.baseAddr := baseAddr
601	    result.addrs := addrs
602	    result.data := data
603	    result.elemStride := elemStride
604	    result.segmentStride := segmentStride
605	    result.elemWidth := elemWidth
606	    result.sew := sew
607	    result.indexParitions := indexParitions
608	    result.vectorLoop := vectorLoop
609	    result
610	  }
611	
612	  def scalarLoadResult(): UInt = {
613	    val word = Cat(data(3), data(2), data(1), data(0))
614	    val half = Cat(data(1), data(0))
615	    val byte =  data(0)
616	    // Sign extends the result of a load operation when necessary.
617	    val halfSigned = Wire(SInt(32.W))
618	    halfSigned := half.asSInt
619	    val byteSigned = Wire(SInt(32.W))
620	    byteSigned := byte.asSInt
621	    MuxLookup(op, 0.U)(Seq(
622	      LsuOp.LB -> byteSigned.asUInt,
623	      LsuOp.LBU -> byte,
624	      LsuOp.LH -> halfSigned.asUInt,
625	      LsuOp.LHU -> half,
626	      LsuOp.LW -> word,
627	      LsuOp.FLOAT -> word,
628	    ))
629	  }
630	
631	  override def toPrintable: Printable = {
632	    val lines = (0 until bytesPerSlot).map(i =>
633	        cf"  $i: ${active(i)}, 0x${addrs(i)}%x, 0x${data(i)}%x\n")
634	    cf"store: $store\n  op: ${op}\n  pc: 0x${pc}%x\n" +
635	    cf"  baseAddr: 0x${baseAddr}%x\n" +
636	    cf"  pendingWriteback: ${pendingWriteback}\n" +
637	    cf"  vectorLoop:\n${vectorLoop.toPrintable}" +
638	    cf"  elemWidth: 0b${elemWidth}%b elemStride: ${elemStride}\n" +
639	    lines.reduce(_+_)
640	  }
641	}
642	
643	object LsuSlot {
644	  def inactive(p: Parameters, bytesPerSlot: Int): LsuSlot = {
645	    0.U.asTypeOf(new LsuSlot(p, bytesPerSlot))
646	  }
647	
648	  def fromLsuUOp(uop: LsuUOp, p: Parameters, bytesPerSlot: Int): LsuSlot = {
649	    val result = Wire(new LsuSlot(p, bytesPerSlot))
650	    result.op := uop.op
651	    result.rd := uop.rd
652	    result.store := uop.store
653	    result.pc := uop.pc
654	    if (p.enableRvv) {
655	      val effectiveLmul = MuxCase(uop.emul_data.getOrElse(0.U)(1, 0), Seq(
656	        // Treat fractional EMULs as EMUL=1
657	        (uop.emul_data.getOrElse(0.U)(2)) -> 0.U(2.W),
658	      ))
659	      val origLmul = MuxCase(uop.emul_data_orig.getOrElse(0.U)(1, 0), Seq(
660	        // Treat fractional EMULs as EMUL=1
661	        (uop.emul_data_orig.getOrElse(0.U)(2)) -> 0.U(2.W),
662	      ))
663	
664	      val nfields = Mux(LsuOp.isVector(uop.op), uop.nfields.get, 0.U)
665	      // Determine number of rvv2lsu interactions required for one vector for
666	      // indexed loads. This occurs when the index dtype is greater than data
667	      // dtype.
668	      val elemWidth = uop.elemWidth.get
669	      val elemMultiplier = MuxUpTo1H(1.U, Seq(
670	        // 8-bit data, 16-bit indices
671	        ((elemWidth === "b101".U) && (uop.sew.get === 0.U)) -> 2.U,
672	        // 8-bit data, 32-bit indices
673	        ((elemWidth === "b110".U) && (uop.sew.get === 0.U)) -> 4.U,
674	        // 16-bit data, 32-bit indices
675	        ((elemWidth === "b110".U) && (uop.sew.get === 1.U)) -> 2.U,
676	      ))
677	      val max_subvector = MuxUpTo1H(1.U, Seq(
678	        ((elemMultiplier === 2.U) && (uop.emul_data.get.asSInt >= 0.S)) -> 2.U,
679	        ((elemMultiplier === 4.U) && (uop.emul_data.get.asSInt >= 0.S)) -> 4.U,
680	        ((elemMultiplier === 4.U) && (uop.emul_data.get.asSInt === -1.S)) -> 2.U,
681	      ))
682	      // [0..x] data vecs we can operate on with one index vec
683	      result.indexParitions := MuxUpTo1H(1.U, Seq(
684	        // 16-bit data, 8-bit indices
685	        ((elemWidth === "b000".U) && (uop.sew.get === 1.U)) -> 2.U,
686	        // 32-bit data, 8-bit indices
687	        ((elemWidth === "b000".U) && (uop.sew.get === 2.U)) -> 4.U,
688	        // 32-bit data, 16-bit indices
689	        ((elemWidth === "b101".U) && (uop.sew.get === 2.U)) -> 2.U,
690	      ))
691	      result.vectorLoop := MakeWireBundle[LsuVectorLoop](
692	          new LsuVectorLoop,
693	          _.subvector -> LoopingCounter(MuxCase(0.U, Seq(
694	            LsuOp.isIndexedVector(uop.op) -> max_subvector,
695	            LsuOp.isVector(uop.op) -> 1.U,
696	          ))),
697	          _.segment -> LoopingCounter(
698	              Mux(LsuOp.isVector(uop.op), nfields, 0.U)),
699	          _.lmul -> LoopingCounter(
700	              Mux(LsuOp.isVector(uop.op), (1.U(4.W) << effectiveLmul), 0.U)),
701	          _.lmul_orig -> (1.U(4.W) << origLmul),
702	          _.rdStart -> uop.rd,
703	          _.rd -> uop.rd,
704	      )
705	    } else {
706	      result.indexParitions := 0.U
707	      result.vectorLoop := 0.U.asTypeOf(result.vectorLoop)
708	    }
709	
710	    // All vector ops require writeback. Lsu needs to inform RVV core store uop
711	    // has completed.
712	    result.pendingWriteback := !uop.store || LsuOp.isVector(uop.op)
713	
714	    val active = MuxUpTo1H(0.U(bytesPerSlot.W), Seq(
715	      uop.op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LB, LsuOp.LBU, LsuOp.SB) -> "b1".U(bytesPerSlot.W),
716	      uop.op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LH, LsuOp.LHU, LsuOp.SH) -> "b11".U(bytesPerSlot.W),
717	      uop.op.isOneOf(LsuOp.LW, LsuOp.SW, LsuOp.FLOAT) -> "b1111".U(bytesPerSlot.W),
718	      // Vector
719	      LsuOp.isVector(uop.op) -> 0.U(bytesPerSlot.W),
720	    ))
721	    result.active := active.asBools
722	
723	    // Compute addrs
724	    result.baseAddr := uop.addr
725	    result.elemWidth := uop.elemWidth.getOrElse(0.U(3.W))
726	    result.sew := uop.sew.getOrElse(0.U(3.W))
727	    result.addrs := Mux(
728	        uop.op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_STRIDED, LsuOp.VSTORE_STRIDED),
729	        ComputeStridedAddrs(bytesPerSlot, uop.addr, uop.data, uop.elemWidth.getOrElse(0.U(3.W))),
730	        VecInit((0 until bytesPerSlot).map(i => uop.addr + i.U)))
731	
732	    val unitStride = Mux(
733	        uop.op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_OINDEXED, LsuOp.VLOAD_UINDEXED,
734	                       LsuOp.VSTORE_OINDEXED, LsuOp.VSTORE_UINDEXED),
735	        // Indexed load. The unit stride also controls segment stride.
736	        MuxUpTo1H(1.U, Seq(
737	            (result.sew === "b000".U) -> 1.U,  // 1-byte elements
738	            (result.sew === "b001".U) -> 2.U,  // 2-byte elements
739	            (result.sew === "b010".U) -> 4.U,  // 4-byte elements
740	        )),
741	        // Non-indexed load.
742	        MuxUpTo1H(1.U, Seq(
743	            (uop.elemWidth.getOrElse(3.U) === "b000".U) -> 1.U,  // 1-byte elements
744	            (uop.elemWidth.getOrElse(3.U) === "b101".U) -> 2.U,  // 2-byte elements
745	            (uop.elemWidth.getOrElse(3.U) === "b110".U) -> 4.U,  // 4-byte elements
746	        )),
747	    )
748	
749	    result.segmentStride := unitStride
750	    result.elemStride := Mux(
751	        uop.op.isOneOf(LsuOp.VLOAD_UNIT, LsuOp.VSTORE_UNIT),
752	        unitStride + (uop.nfields.getOrElse(3.U) * unitStride),
753	        uop.data)
754	
755	    result.data(0) := uop.data(7, 0)
756	    result.data(1) := uop.data(15, 8)
757	    result.data(2) := uop.data(23, 16)
758	    result.data(3) := uop.data(31, 24)
759	    for (i <- 4 until bytesPerSlot) {
760	      result.data(i) := 0.U
761	    }
762	
763	    result
764	  }
765	}
766

772	  val index = UInt(5.W)
773	  val size = UInt((log2Ceil(p.lsuDataBits / 8) + 1).W)
774	  val fullsize = UInt((log2Ceil(p.lsuDataBits / 8) + 1).W)
775	  val write = Bool()
776	  val sext = Bool()
777	  val iload = Bool()
778	  val fencei = Bool()
779	  val flushat = Bool()
780	  val flushall = Bool()
781	  val sldst = Bool()  // scalar load/store cached
782	  val vldst = Bool()  // vector load/store
783	  val fldst = Bool() // float load/store
784	  val regionType = MemoryRegionType()

786	  val last = Bool()

793	  val fullsize = UInt((log2Ceil(p.lsuDataBits / 8) + 1).W)
794	  val sext = Bool()
795	  val iload = Bool()
796	  val sldst = Bool()
797	  val fldst = Bool()

803	object LsuBus extends ChiselEnum {
804	  val IBUS = Value
805	  val DBUS = Value
806	  val EXTERNAL = Value
807	}

812	}

814	object LsuRead {
815	  def apply(bus: LsuBus.Type, lineAddr: UInt): LsuRead = {
816	    val result = Wire(new LsuRead(lineAddr.getWidth))
817	    result.bus := bus

823	class FlushCmd extends Bundle {
824	  val all = Bool()
825	  val fencei = Bool()
826	  val pcNext = UInt(32.W)
827	}
828	
829	object FlushCmd {
830	  def apply(cmd: LsuCmd): FlushCmd = {
831	    val result = Wire(new FlushCmd)
832	    result.all    := cmd.op.isOneOf(LsuOp.FENCEI, LsuOp.FLUSHALL)
833	    result.fencei := (cmd.op === LsuOp.FENCEI)
834	    result.pcNext := cmd.pc + 4.U
835	    result
836	  }
837	}
838	
839	class LsuV2(p: Parameters) extends Lsu(p) {
840	  class LsuFault(p: Parameters) extends Bundle {
841	    val info = new FaultInfo(p)
842	    val rd = UInt(5.W)
843	    val op = LsuOp()
844	    val store = Bool()
845	  }
846	
847	  // Tie-offs
848	  io.vldst := 0.U
849	
850	  val opQueue = Module(new CircularBufferMulti(new LsuUOp(p), p.instructionLanes, 4))
851	  opQueue.io.flush := false.B
852	  io.queueCapacity := opQueue.io.nSpace
853	
854	  // Flush state
855	  // DispatchV2 will only flush on first slot, when LSU is inactive.
856	
857	  val flushCmd = RegInit(MakeInvalid(new FlushCmd))  // Track pending flush + pc
858	  io.flush.valid  := flushCmd.valid
859	  io.flush.all    := flushCmd.bits.all
860	  io.flush.clean  := true.B
861	  io.flush.fencei := flushCmd.bits.fencei
862	  io.flush.pcNext := flushCmd.bits.pcNext
863	
864	  flushCmd := MuxCase(flushCmd, Seq(
865	    // New flush command
866	    (io.req(0).fire && LsuOp.isFlush(io.req(0).bits.op))
867	        -> MakeValid(true.B, FlushCmd(io.req(0).bits)),
868	    // Finish flush command
869	    (io.flush.valid && io.flush.ready) -> MakeInvalid(new FlushCmd),
870	  ))
871	
872	  // Accept one instruction per cycle.
873	  val queueSpace = opQueue.io.nSpace
874	  val validSum = io.req.map(_.valid).scan(
875	      0.U(log2Ceil(p.instructionLanes + 1).W))(_+_)
876	  for (i <- 0 until p.instructionLanes) {
877	    io.req(i).ready := (validSum(i) < queueSpace) && !flushCmd.valid
878	  }
879	
880	  val ops = (0 until p.instructionLanes).map(i =>
881	    MakeValid(
882	        io.req(i).fire && !LsuOp.isFlush(io.req(i).bits.op),
883	        LsuUOp(p, i, io.req(i).bits, io.busPort, io.busPort_flt, io.rvvState))
884	  )
885	  val alignedOps = Aligner(ops)
886	
887	  opQueue.io.enqValid := PopCount(alignedOps.map(_.valid))
888	  opQueue.io.enqData := alignedOps.map(_.bits)
889	  assert(opQueue.io.enqValid <= opQueue.io.nSpace)
890	
891	  val nextSlot = LsuSlot.fromLsuUOp(opQueue.io.dataOut(0), p, 16)
892	
893	  // Tracks if a read has been fired last cycle.
894	  val readFired = RegInit(MakeInvalid(new LsuRead(32 - nextSlot.elemBits)))
895	  val slot = RegInit(LsuSlot.inactive(p, 16))
896	
897	  val readData = MuxLookup(readFired.bits.bus, 0.U)(Seq(
898	      LsuBus.IBUS -> io.ibus.rdata,
899	      LsuBus.DBUS -> io.dbus.rdata,
900	      LsuBus.EXTERNAL -> io.ebus.dbus.rdata,
901	  ))
902	
903	  // ==========================================================================
904	  // Vector update
905	  val vectorUpdatedSlot = if (p.enableRvv) {
906	      io.rvv2lsu.get(0).ready := slot.pendingVector()
907	      io.rvv2lsu.get(1).ready := false.B
908	      slot.vectorUpdate(io.rvv2lsu.get(0).bits)
909	  } else {
910	      slot
911	  }
912	
913	  // ==========================================================================
914	  // Transaction update
915	  val faultReg = RegInit(MakeInvalid(new LsuFault(p)))
916	
917	  // First stage of load update: Update results based on bus read
918	  val loadUpdatedSlot = Mux(readFired.valid,
919	                            slot.loadUpdate(readFired.bits.lineAddr, readData),
920	                            slot)
921	
922	  // Compute next target transaction
923	  val targetAddress = loadUpdatedSlot.targetAddress(
924	      MakeValid(readFired.valid, readFired.bits.lineAddr))
925	  val targetLine = MakeValid(
926	      targetAddress.valid, targetAddress.bits(31, nextSlot.elemBits))
927	  val targetLineAddr = targetLine.bits << 4
928	  val itcm = p.m.filter(_.memType == MemoryRegionType.IMEM)
929	                .map(_.contains(targetLineAddr)).reduceOption(_ || _).getOrElse(false.B)
930	  val dtcm = p.m.filter(_.memType == MemoryRegionType.DMEM)
931	                .map(_.contains(targetLineAddr)).reduceOption(_ || _).getOrElse(true.B)
932	  val peri = p.m.filter(_.memType == MemoryRegionType.Peripheral)
933	                .map(_.contains(targetLineAddr)).reduceOption(_ || _).getOrElse(false.B)
934	  val external = !(itcm || dtcm || peri)
935	  assert(PopCount(Cat(itcm | dtcm | peri)) <= 1.U)
936	
937	  val (wdata, wmask, wactive) = slot.scatter(targetLine.bits)
938	
939	  val (opSize, alignedAddress) = LsuOp.opSize(slot.op, targetAddress.bits, p)
940	
941	  // ibus data path
942	  io.ibus.valid := loadUpdatedSlot.activeTransaction() && itcm && !slot.store && !faultReg.valid
943	  io.ibus.addr := targetLineAddr
944	
945	  // dbus data path
946	  io.dbus.valid := dtcm && Mux(slot.store,
947	                               slot.activeTransaction(),
948	                               loadUpdatedSlot.activeTransaction()) && !faultReg.valid
949	  io.dbus.write := slot.store
950	  io.dbus.pc := slot.pc
951	  io.dbus.addr := targetLineAddr
952	  io.dbus.adrx := targetLineAddr
953	  io.dbus.size := opSize
954	  io.dbus.wdata := Cat(wdata.reverse)
955	  io.dbus.wmask := Cat(wmask.reverse)
956	
957	  // ebus data path
958	  io.ebus.dbus.valid := (external || peri) && Mux(slot.store,
959	                                                  slot.activeTransaction(),
960	                                                  loadUpdatedSlot.activeTransaction()) && !faultReg.valid
961	  io.ebus.dbus.write := slot.store
962	  io.ebus.dbus.addr := alignedAddress
963	  io.ebus.dbus.adrx := targetLineAddr
964	  io.ebus.dbus.size := opSize
965	  io.ebus.dbus.wdata := Cat(wdata.reverse)
966	  io.ebus.dbus.wmask := Cat(wmask.reverse)
967	  io.ebus.dbus.pc := slot.pc
968	  io.ebus.internal := peri
969	
970	  val ibusFired = io.ibus.valid && io.ibus.ready
971	  val dbusFired = io.dbus.valid && io.dbus.ready
972	  val ebusFired = io.ebus.dbus.valid && io.ebus.dbus.ready
973	  assert(PopCount(Seq(ibusFired, dbusFired, ebusFired)) <= 1.U)
974	  val slotFired = ebusFired || dbusFired || ibusFired
975	
976	  val readFiredValid = ibusFired || (dbusFired && !io.dbus.write) || (ebusFired && !io.ebus.dbus.write)
977	  readFired := MakeValid(readFiredValid,
978	    MuxCase(readFired.bits, Seq(
979	      (ibusFired) -> LsuRead(LsuBus.IBUS, targetLine.bits),
980	      (dbusFired && !io.dbus.write) -> LsuRead(LsuBus.DBUS, targetLine.bits),
981	      (ebusFired && !io.ebus.dbus.write) -> LsuRead(LsuBus.EXTERNAL, targetLine.bits),
982	    )))
983	
984	  // Fault handling
985	  val ibusFault = Wire(Valid(new FaultInfo(p)))
986	  ibusFault.valid := loadUpdatedSlot.activeTransaction() && itcm && slot.store
987	  ibusFault.bits.write := true.B
988	  ibusFault.bits.addr := targetLineAddr
989	  ibusFault.bits.epc := slot.pc
990	
991	  io.fault.valid := faultReg.valid
992	  io.fault.bits := faultReg.bits.info
993	  faultReg := {
994	    val f = Wire(Valid(new LsuFault(p)))
995	    val nextFaultInfo = MuxCase(MakeInvalid(new FaultInfo(p)), Seq(
996	        io.ebus.fault.valid -> io.ebus.fault,
997	        ibusFault.valid -> ibusFault,
998	    ))
999	    f.valid := nextFaultInfo.valid
1000	    f.bits.info := nextFaultInfo.bits
1001	    f.bits.rd := slot.rd
1002	    f.bits.op := slot.op
1003	    f.bits.store := slot.store
1004	    f
1005	  }
1006	
1007	  // Transaction update
1008	  val storeUpdate = Mux(slotFired, wactive, VecInit.fill(16)(false.B))
1009	  val transactionUpdatedSlot = Mux(slot.store,
1010	      slot.storeUpdate(storeUpdate), loadUpdatedSlot)
1011	  val lsu2RvvFire = if (p.enableRvv) { io.lsu2rvv.get(0).fire } else { false.B }
1012	  // For scalar stores: complete when transaction is done (slotFired && all bytes written)
1013	  // For vector stores: complete when lsu2rvv handshake fires with last=1
1014	  // These happen in different cycles, so we can't AND them together.
1015	  val scalarStoreComplete = slotFired && slot.store && !slot.slotIdle() &&
1016	      transactionUpdatedSlot.slotIdle() && !LsuOp.isVector(slot.op)
1017	  val vectorStoreComplete = if (p.enableRvv) {
1018	      lsu2RvvFire && io.lsu2rvv.get(0).bits.last
1019	  } else { false.B }
1020	  val storeComplete = scalarStoreComplete || vectorStoreComplete
1021	  io.storeComplete := Mux(storeComplete && !io.ebus.fault.valid, MakeValid(slot.pc), MakeInvalid(UInt(p.programCounterBits.W)))
1022	
1023	
1024	  // ==========================================================================
1025	  // Writeback update
1026	
1027	  val currentOp = Mux(faultReg.valid, faultReg.bits.op, slot.op)
1028	  val currentStore = Mux(faultReg.valid, faultReg.bits.store, slot.store)
1029	
1030	  // Scalar writeback
1031	  // Write back on error. io.fault.valid will mask
1032	  io.rd.valid := ((faultReg.valid && LsuOp.isScalarLoad(faultReg.bits.op)) || slot.shouldWriteback()) &&
1033	      currentOp.isOneOf(LsuOp.LB, LsuOp.LBU, LsuOp.LH, LsuOp.LHU, LsuOp.LW)
1034	
1035	  io.rd.bits.data := slot.scalarLoadResult()
1036	  io.rd.bits.addr := Mux(faultReg.valid, faultReg.bits.rd, slot.rd)
1037	
1038	  // Float writeback
1039	  io.rd_flt.valid := ((faultReg.valid && !currentStore) || slot.shouldWriteback()) &&
1040	                     (currentOp === LsuOp.FLOAT)
1041	  io.rd_flt.bits.addr := Mux(faultReg.valid, faultReg.bits.rd, slot.rd)
1042	  io.rd_flt.bits.data := slot.scalarLoadResult()
1043	
1044	  // Vector writeback
1045	  if (p.enableRvv) {
1046	    val faultDetected = faultReg.valid
1047	    // If a fault occurs, we must still signal completion to the RVV core so it can
1048	    // retire the instruction (and take the trap).
1049	    val vectorFault = faultDetected && LsuOp.isVector(currentOp)
1050	
1051	    io.lsu2rvv.get(0).valid := (slot.shouldWriteback() && LsuOp.isVector(currentOp)) || vectorFault
1052	    io.lsu2rvv.get(0).bits.addr := Mux(faultReg.valid, faultReg.bits.rd, slot.rd)
1053	    io.lsu2rvv.get(0).bits.data := Cat(slot.data.reverse)
1054	    io.lsu2rvv.get(0).bits.last := (slot.shouldWriteback() || vectorFault) &&
1055	        currentOp.isOneOf(LsuOp.VSTORE_UNIT, LsuOp.VSTORE_STRIDED,
1056	                        LsuOp.VSTORE_OINDEXED, LsuOp.VSTORE_UINDEXED)
1057	
1058	    io.lsu2rvv.get(1).valid := false.B
1059	    io.lsu2rvv.get(1).bits.addr := 0.U
1060	    io.lsu2rvv.get(1).bits.data := 0.U
1061	    io.lsu2rvv.get(1).bits.last := true.B
1062	  }
1063	
1064	  val writebacksFired = Seq(io.rd.valid, io.rd_flt.valid) ++ (if (p.enableRvv) {
1065	      Seq(io.lsu2rvv.get(0).fire) } else { Seq() })
1066	  assert(PopCount(writebacksFired) <= 1.U)
1067	  val writebackFired = writebacksFired.reduce(_ || _)
1068	  val writebackUpdatedSlot = slot.writebackUpdate()
1069	
1070	  // TODO(derekjchow): Improve timing?
1071	  opQueue.io.deqReady := Mux(slot.slotIdle() && (opQueue.io.nEnqueued > 0.U), 1.U, 0.U)
1072	
1073	  // ==========================================================================
1074	  // State transition
1075	
1076	  // Assertions
1077	  val vectorUpdate = io.rvv2lsu.map(_(0).fire).getOrElse(false.B)
1078	  assert(!vectorUpdate || slot.pendingVector())
1079	  assert(!writebackFired || (slot.shouldWriteback() || faultReg.valid))
1080	
1081	  // Slot update
1082	  val slotNext = MuxCase(slot, Seq(
1083	    // Move to inactive if error.
1084	    (faultReg.valid) -> LsuSlot.inactive(p, 16),
1085	    // When inactive, dequeue if possible
1086	    (slot.slotIdle() && (opQueue.io.nEnqueued > 0.U)) -> nextSlot,
1087	    // Vector update.
1088	    vectorUpdate -> vectorUpdatedSlot,
1089	    // Active transaction update.
1090	    slot.activeTransaction() -> transactionUpdatedSlot,
1091	    // Writeback update.
1092	    writebackFired -> writebackUpdatedSlot,
1093	  ))
1094	
1095	  slot := slotNext
1096	
1097	  io.active := !slot.slotIdle() || (opQueue.io.nEnqueued =/= 0.U)
1098	}

file.content:
if (p.enableRvv) {
    lsu.io.rvvState.get := io.rvvcore.get.configState
    lsu.io.lsu2rvv.get <> io.rvvcore.get.lsu2rvv
    io.rvvcore.get.rvv2lsu <> lsu.io.rvv2lsu.get
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Multiplier Unit
  for (i <- 0 until p.instructionLanes) {
    mlu.io.req(i) <> dispatch.io.mlu(i)
    mlu.io.rs1(i) := regfile.io.readData(2 * i)
    mlu.io.rs2(i) := regfile.io.readData((2 * i) + 1)
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Divide Unit
  dvu.io.req <> dispatch.io.dvu(0)
  dvu.io.rs1 := regfile.io.readData(0)
  dvu.io.rs2 := regfile.io.readData(1)
  dvu.io.rd.ready := !mlu.io.rd.valid

  // TODO: make port conditional on pipeline index.
  for (i <- 1 until p.instructionLanes) {
    dispatch.io.dvu(i).ready := false.B
  }

  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Register File
  for (i <- 0 until p.instructionLanes) {
    regfile.io.readAddr(2 * i + 0) := dispatch.io.rs1Read(i)
    regfile.io.readAddr(2 * i + 1) := dispatch.io.rs2Read(i)
    regfile.io.readSet(2 * i + 0) := dispatch.io.rs1Set(i)
    regfile.io.readSet(2 * i + 1) := dispatch.io.rs2Set(i)
    regfile.io.writeAddr(i) := dispatch.io.rdMark(i)
    regfile.io.busAddr(i) := dispatch.io.busRead(i)

    regfile.io.debugBusPort <> io.dm.scalar_rs

    val csr0Valid = if (i == 0) csr.io.rd.valid else false.B
    val csr0Addr  = if (i == 0) csr.io.rd.bits.addr else 0.U
    val csr0Data  = if (i == 0) csr.io.rd.bits.data else 0.U

    val rvvCoreRdValid = io.rvvcore.map(_.rd(i).valid).getOrElse(false.B)
    val rvvCoreRdAddr = MuxOR(
        rvvCoreRdValid, io.rvvcore.map(_.rd(i).bits.addr).getOrElse(0.U))
    val rvvCoreRdData = MuxOR(
        rvvCoreRdValid, io.rvvcore.map(_.rd(i).bits.data).getOrElse(0.U))

    regfile.io.writeData(i).valid := csr0Valid ||
                                     alu(i).io.rd.valid || bru(i).io.rd.valid ||
                                     rvvCoreRdValid

    regfile.io.writeData(i).bits.addr :=
        MuxOR(csr0Valid, csr0Addr) |
        MuxOR(alu(i).io.rd.valid, alu(i).io.rd.bits.addr) |
        MuxOR(bru(i).io.rd.valid, bru(i).io.rd.bits.addr) |
        rvvCoreRdAddr

    regfile.io.writeData(i).bits.data :=
        MuxOR(csr0Valid, csr0Data) |
        MuxOR(alu(i).io.rd.valid, alu(i).io.rd.bits.data) |
        MuxOR(bru(i).io.rd.valid, bru(i).io.rd.bits.data) |
        rvvCoreRdData

    if (p.enableRvv) {
      assert((csr0Valid +&
              alu(i).io.rd.valid +& bru(i).io.rd.valid +&
              io.rvvcore.get.rd(i).valid) <= 1.U)
    } else {
      assert((csr0Valid +&
             alu(i).io.rd.valid +& bru(i).io.rd.valid) <= 1.U)
    }
  }

  // RV32F extension
  val floatCore = Option.when(p.enableFloat)(FloatCore(p))
  val floatReadPorts = 3
  val floatWritePorts = 2
  val fRegfile = Option.when(p.enableFloat)(Module(new FRegfile(p, floatReadPorts, floatWritePorts)))
  if (p.enableFloat) {
    lsu.io.busPort_flt.get := fRegfile.get.io.busPort
    fRegfile.get.io.busPortAddr := dispatch.io.fbusPortAddr.get
    fRegfile.get.io.scoreboard_set :=
      MuxOR(dispatch.io.rdMark_flt.get.valid, UIntToOH(dispatch.io.rdMark_flt.get.addr))
    // Mux input to read port 0
    fRegfile.get.io.read_ports(0).valid := MuxCase(false.B, Seq(
      io.dm.float_rs.get.valid -> true.B,
      floatCore.get.io.read_ports(0).valid -> true.B,
      dispatch.io.frs1Read.get(0).valid -> true.B,
    ))
